count.label: Percent of Lights
count.description: Percentage of pixels that are actively twinkling at any given time. Higher values create a denser twinkling field.

reRandomize.label: Re-Randomize after twinkle
reRandomize.description: When enabled, each pixel is assigned a new random position after its twinkle cycle completes. When disabled, pixels twinkle in the same locations repeatedly.

steps.label: Twinkle Steps
steps.description: Number of frames for a complete twinkle cycle (fade up then fade down). Lower values create faster, snappier twinkles; higher values create slow, gentle fades.

strobe.label: Strobe
strobe.description: When enabled, twinkling pixels snap on and off instantly instead of fading, creating a strobe-like flash effect.

style.label: Style
style.description: Selects the rendering algorithm. Old Render Method uses the original per-frame logic; New Render Method uses an updated approach with smoother transitions.

registryDefinition.notes: Higher-value texture effect than Shimmer for long-term training. Density, dwell, strobe behavior, rerandomization, and render method should be screened first.
